title: proc_group: new pass
body:
The proc_group pass canonicalizes left-hand side of assignments in
processes, ensuring that for any two assign actions, the left-hand
side either has same bits in same order, or no common bits at all.
This allows the following passes to consider assigns the smallest
trackable unit; for example it improves the precision of proc_prune.

The actual motivation for this pass is my work on replacement for
proc_mux where I would like to assume that each assignment LHS
can be directly turned into an output of a `$pmux` cell, but it seems
useful on its own as well.
